title: Inviting Spanish Rice Paella
description: A traditional Valencian dish with a twist, featuring shio-koji for added depth of flavor, perfect for a brunch gathering
instructions: Preheat the donabe over medium heat, adding the dum olive oil to coat the bottom
Add the minced garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant and lightly browned
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes
Add the artichoke hearts, smoked paprika, saffron threads, and sea salt, stirring to combine
Add the uncooked spanish rice, stirring to coat the rice in the oil and mix with the vegetables
Add the shio-koji and water, stirring to combine, then bring to a boil
Reduce the heat to low, cover the donabe, and simmer, undisturbed, for 20 minutes
Remove the donabe from the heat and let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes
Fluff the paella with a fork and serve hot
